text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 299 

REDUCED_DED 

LABEL: Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Reduced Deductible Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing in the deductible phase of the 
Part D benefit. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: This variable applies ONLY to the Enhanced
